mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM t_receive_order_invoice where receive_order_id in
#{item}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_receive_order_invoice set invoice_status = #{invoiceStatus},invoice_user_id =#{invoiceUserId},invoice_remark = #{remark} where receive_order_id = #{receiveOrderId}
mapper.select:
SELECT ro.shipper_id, roi.invoice_amount amount FROM t_receive_order_invoice roi left join t_receive_order ro on roi.receive_order_id = ro.receive_order_id left join t_receive_order_cost_item roci on roci.receive_order_id = ro.receive_order_id where ro.verification_flag = #{verificationFlag} and roi.invoice_status = #{invoiceStatus} and roci.waybill_id in
#{item}
